steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage says the World Cup “has expanded greatly” since 1934, showing it was smaller before, so the blank needs a word that signals a contrast with that earlier size.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content: “On the other hand” sets up that contrast between the current expanded tournament and the earlier 16‑team version. The other three either show cause‑effect, sequence, or similarity, which do not fit the needed contrast. That matches choice C — C is correct.
